text.title: Changelog Automation Conventional Commits Worked Example
text.summary: Worked release-notes example for v1.4.0 of a small CLI tool. Commits include feat, fix, chore, and one breaking refactor; output groups them and surfaces the breaking change at the top.

section.title: Input — commit range v1.3.0..HEAD
section.code: a1b2c3d feat(api): add /v2/quote endpoint b2c3d4e fix(billing): FX rounding mismatch on EUR-PT c3d4e5f refactor!: drop legacy /v1 endpoint BODY: BREAKING CHANGE: clients on /v1 must migrate to /v2. d4e5f6g chore: bump deps e5f6g7h ci: parallelize lint + typecheck f6g7h8i docs: update README pricing table g7h8i9j test: add parity-report fixtures

section.title: Emitted JSON artefact
section.code: { "artefact_id": "chg-v1-4-0", "range_from": "v1.3.0", "range_to": "HEAD", "release_version": "v2.0.0", "release_date": "2026-05-23", "semver_bump": "major", "sections": { "breaking": ["drop legacy /v1 endpoint — clients on /v1 must migrate to /v2"], "feat": ["(api) add /v2/quote endpoint"], "fix": ["(billing) FX rounding mismatch on EUR-PT"], "chore": ["bump deps"], "refactor": ["drop legacy /v1 endpoint"], "docs": ["update README pricing table"], "perf": [], "test": ["add parity-report fixtures"], "build": [], "ci": ["parallelize lint + typecheck"], "style": [], "deviations": [] }, "verdict": "emit-changelog", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }

section.title: Resulting CHANGELOG block
section.code:
## [v2.0.0] - 2026-05-23
### BREAKING CHANGES - drop legacy /v1 endpoint — clients on /v1 must migrate to /v2
### Features - (api) add /v2/quote endpoint
### Fixes - (billing) FX rounding mismatch on EUR-PT
### Refactors - drop legacy /v1 endpoint
### Tests - add parity-report fixtures
### Docs - update README pricing table
### CI - parallelize lint + typecheck
### Chores - bump deps
section.note: Because a breaking refactor entered the range, the deterministic semver bump is major — not minor; declared release_version=v2.0.0 (not v1.4.0).
